message:
test: pin flock+lockf conformance via differential harness

Adds tests/conformance_diff_flock_lockf.rs covering 2 functions:
- flock: LOCK_EX+UN, LOCK_SH+UN round-trips, invalid-op edge,
  bad-fd edge
- lockf: F_LOCK+F_ULOCK round-trip on a 64-byte tempfile, F_TEST
  on unlocked region, bad-fd edge

8 tests pass, 0 divergences against glibc.

Bead: bd-flk1
